carriers.conditional_two_point_boundary: Displayed only as the result of a further standard free-field quantization assumption; the OPH construction has not supplied the required physical Hilbert-space and pole receipts.
explicit_nonclaims: the compact group alone produces a connection or Maxwell kinetic term
the OPH construction supplies a photon Fock space or LSZ pole
absence of every effective photon mass in every phase or medium
carriers.gauge_fixing: Lorenz covariant gauge partial_mu A^mu=0; quotient residual gauge directions
carriers.hard_mass_parameter_semantics: Coefficient in the displayed free quadratic operator on the declared branch; not a measured rest mass and not by itself a quantum-particle pole claim.
carriers.label: Electromagnetic carrier
carriers.phase_boundary: Requires an unbroken U(1), a nonzero Maxwell kinetic term, and a deconfined phase. A Higgs or Stueckelberg realization and medium-induced effective masses are not excluded by symmetry alone.
carriers.physical_degrees_of_freedom: two transverse classical polarizations in four dimensions
carriers.quadratic_action: S2[A]=-(Z_A/4) int F_{mu nu}F^{mu nu} -(Z_A/(2 xi)) int (partial_mu A^mu)^2

carriers.classical_spectrum: omega(k)^2=|k|^2 for the free quadratic modes; characteristic surface k^2=0
carriers.conditional_two_point_boundary: Displayed only as the result of a further standard free-field quantization assumption; the OPH construction has not supplied the required physical Hilbert-space and pole receipts.
explicit_nonclaims: a deconfined asymptotic gluon in four-dimensional confining QCD
absence of gauge-invariant massive bound states
carriers.gauge_fixing: covariant gauge with the usual constraint/BRST quotient at the perturbative free level
carriers.hard_mass_parameter_semantics: Coefficient in the displayed free quadratic operator on the declared branch; not a measured rest mass and not by itself a quantum-particle pole claim.
carriers.label: Color gauge carrier
carriers.phase_boundary: This is a classical/perturbative pre-confinement statement. On the confining QCD phase, a colored gauge-potential pole is not an asymptotic gluon particle.
carriers.physical_degrees_of_freedom: two perturbative transverse modes per Lie-algebra generator
carriers.quadratic_action: S2[A]=-(Z_g/4) int (partial_mu A_nu^a-partial_nu A_mu^a)^2 -(Z_g/(2 xi)) int (partial_mu A^{a mu})^2
carriers.quadratic_operator: K^{ab}_{mu nu}=delta^{ab} Z_g[-k^2 eta_{mu nu}+(1-xi^{-1})k_mu k_nu]
carriers.reduced_classical_hamiltonian: H2=(Z_g/2) sum_a int (|E_T^a|^2+|B^a|^2), positive at the free level for Z_g>0

carriers.classical_spectrum: omega(k)^2=|k|^2 on Minkowski; null characteristic k^2=0
carriers.conditional_two_point_boundary: Displayed only as the result of a further standard free-field quantization assumption; the OPH construction has not supplied the required physical Hilbert-space and pole receipts.
explicit_nonclaims: the classical Einstein equation constructs a graviton Hilbert space
an OPH-derived quantum graviton pole or interacting S-matrix
exclusion of every additional massive scalar or spin-two mode in extended theories
carriers.gauge_fixing: de Donder gauge; on Minkowski reduce to the transverse-traceless sector
carriers.hard_mass_parameter_semantics: Coefficient in the displayed free quadratic operator on the declared branch; not a measured rest mass and not by itself a quantum-particle pole claim.
carriers.label: Einstein tensor carrier
carriers.phase_boundary: Requires the pure Einstein kinetic branch and a background admitting the stated mode decomposition. Other diffeomorphism-invariant field content or higher-derivative terms may add massive modes.
carriers.physical_degrees_of_freedom: two transverse-traceless classical tensor polarizations in four dimensions
carriers.quadratic_action: S2[h]=(Z_h/2) int [-1/2 partial_lambda h_mu_nu partial^lambda h^mu_nu + partial_mu h^mu_nu partial^lambda h_lambda_nu - partial_mu h^mu_nu partial_nu h + 1/2 partial_lambda h partial^lambda h], the Fierz-Pauli quadratic action from pure Einstein-Hilbert
carriers.reduced_classical_hamiltonian: H2_TT=(Z_h/2) int (|dot h_TT|^2+|grad h_TT|^2), positive for Z_h>0

common_speed_semantics.si_decimal: 299792458 m/s is the exact SI metre/second unit convention, not a predicted decimal magnitude
common_speed_semantics.structural_output: shared invariant null cone / characteristic speed on the declared branch

policy: A reconstructed compact group is not a particle. Public particle promotion requires every classical-action receipt and every independent quantum/phase/pole receipt.
